metadata.note: Check product and producer codes: ISBN10/ISBN13/other standards. If GTIN not present, emit MPN where appropriate.

candidate.description: When standard indicates ISBN/EAN etc., read corresponding code value node.
Alternative nodes where GTIN/MPN may be stored.

method.step: If `producer_code_standard` is ISBN10/ISBN13/EAN etc., map to GTIN and output numeric code.
Else omit or provide `g:mpn` from `producer/@code` if available.
